query:
INSERT INTO digital_products (title, description, price, product_type, file_url, image_url, is_active, created_at, updated_at)
VALUES (
  'EXECUTION OVER EMOTION: Act First. Feel Later. Win Always.',
  'Stop letting how you feel determine what you accomplish. This 5-chapter BUILD LEVEL system teaches you to act first and feel later — building the identity, daily stack, and emotional intelligence of someone who executes no matter what.',
  1999,
  'pdf',
  '/manus-storage/BUILD_LEVEL_Execution_Over_Emotion_9bdad6df.pdf',
  'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310519663635005932/ZpCxvttgRWUJYjQSvWcg6k/execution_over_emotion_cover-XxPLoCsZtshDew6CWZtRnF.webp',
  1,
  NOW(),
  NOW()
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3yjy74Aq4fSfMvH.root --database ZpCxvttgRWUJYjQSvWcg6k --execute

  'Stop letting how you feel determine what you accomplish. This 5-chapter BUILD LEVEL system teaches you to act first and feel later — building the identity, daily stack, and emotional intelligence of someone who executes no matter what.',
